profile.name: Akash Chauhan
profile.title: Senior Frontend Multi-Stack Developer
profile.summary: Results-driven Senior Frontend Multi-Stack Developer with 4+ years of hands-on experience crafting responsive, performant, and scalable web applications. Deep expertise across ReactJS, VueJS, and Angular, enabling seamless adaptation to diverse technology ecosystems and delivering high-impact solutions under tight deadlines.
profile.highlights: Architected enterprise-grade platforms, championed knowledge sharing through technical blogs, department training sessions, and created an AI Prompt Library (v1.2) with 25+ production-ready prompts benefiting the entire Vue.js department.

projects.name: Internal Workflow & Productivity Platform
projects.description: Currently building an internal enterprise workflow and productivity management platform. Handling frontend architecture, component development, and cross-team collaboration within the Vue.js department. Active project — Feb 2026 to present.

projects.name: AI Creator & Fan Interaction Platform
projects.description: AI-powered creator-fan interaction platform built with Vue 3 + TypeScript. Architected complete frontend with Pinia state management, comprehensive route guard system (authentication, verification, subscription) for Creator/Fan/Admin roles. Implemented real-time chat system, Stripe payment integration, onboarding flows, and OAuth (Google/Apple). Created reusable composables, secure API service layer with XSS prevention, and responsive UI using Ant Design Vue with SCSS.

projects.name: Enterprise Real-Time Discovery Platform
projects.description: Rapidly mastered the Angular ecosystem within 2 weeks of project onboarding. Implemented comprehensive SignalR integration for real-time notifications and broadcast features. Created robust global drawer service and reusable Apache ECharts integration for data visualization.

projects.name: Healthcare Management Platform
projects.description: Maintained and debugged legacy codebase with Cloudflare integration. Created comprehensive handover documentation with issue workflows and log analysis steps. Fixed production bugs marked in Release Planner.

projects.name: Inclusive Analytics Platform
projects.description: Data-driven analytics platform for organizational inclusive decision-making and equity metrics. Mastered Chart.js integration for complex data visualization. Led frontend technical decisions and requirement gathering.

projects.name: Client Case Study Builder
projects.description: Internal tool to showcase project case studies to clients, enhancing transparency and trust. R&D on RevealJS (Presentation library) and seamless integration. Implemented Microsoft 365 login using MSAL with Nuxt 3.

projects.name: Employee CV Management Portal
projects.description: Led development of centralized internal system for storing and sharing employee CVs. Managed a team of 2 developers. Handled client communication, presentation, and requirement gathering. Delivered within timeline.

pocs.name: React Query POC
pocs.description: Implemented caching strategies (staleTime, gcTime, deduplication). Built optimistic updates and infinite scroll patterns.

pocs.name: Event-Driven Architecture Warehouse
pocs.description: Frontend event handling with event sourcing patterns. Implemented DLQ (Dead Letter Queue) and replay mechanisms.

pocs.name: Restaurant Monorepo
pocs.description: Monorepo architecture with frontend billing logic. Demonstrated workspace and dependency management.

articles.title: TanStack Query: The Data Fetching Solution You've Been Looking For
How I Moved My App from Nuxt 3 to Nuxt 4
Design Systems Implementation - Atomic Design Methodology

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
experience.details: Delivered 5+ production projects across Angular, Vue 3, and legacy stacks, plus 3 POCs simultaneously. Successfully transitioned across 3 major frameworks within 6 months while maintaining production quality. Conducted department-level SignalR training. Created AI Prompt Library (v1.2) with 25+ production-ready prompts.

experience.title: Software Engineer Trainee
experience.description: Completed intensive training in JavaScript, ReactJS, VueJS, TypeScript. Learned Redux, Redux Toolkit, Vuex, Vuetify, Tailwind CSS. Built demos using Vue 3 with Jest & Vue Test Utils. Participated in company Hackathon.

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering in Information Technology

achievements: Successfully transitioned across 3 major frameworks (Angular → Vue → React) within 6 months while maintaining production code quality
Delivered 5+ production projects across enterprise, healthcare, and analytics domains — plus 3 POCs simultaneously
Led CV Builder project team of 3 members
Created AI Prompt Library benefiting entire Vue.js department

angularConsulting.description: Alongside my full-time role, I've independently provided Angular frontend support to enterprise engineering teams — primarily stack migrations from legacy codebases (AngularJS, React, jQuery) to Angular, component architecture design, and performance hardening. This consulting work pushed my Angular depth far beyond what production projects alone could offer, giving me real exposure to the scale and compliance demands of Fortune 500 engineering.
